steps.title: Use the two given points
steps.content: The line passes through $(0,9)$ and $(1,17)$. The point $(0,9)$ gives the $y$-intercept, so $b=9$.

steps.title: Read the equation
steps.content: The slope is $$m=\frac{17-9}{1-0}=8.$$ With slope $8$ and intercept $9$, the line is $$y=8x+9.$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Only choice D, $y=8x+9$, has slope 8 and $y$-intercept 9. Choice D is correct.
